name: northwind
description:
The northwind database stores salaries for the northwind company.
Northwind sells products to other customer companies and buys products from supplier companies.
Northwind employees manage orders and ship products via shippers to customers.

columns.name: category_id
columns.label: Id
columns.comment: A surrogate primary key that uniquely identifies a category.

columns.name: category_name
columns.label: Name
columns.comment: Name of a category

columns.name: description
columns.label: Description
columns.comment: Description of a category

columns.name: picture
columns.label: Picture
columns.comment: A picture to visualize the category

columns.name: root_category_id
columns.label: Root category
columns.comment: Root

columns.name: super_category_id
columns.label: Super
columns.comment: Super category

tables.name: customers
tables.label: Customer
tables.comment: Contains information about the company's customers, with fields like company_name, contact_name.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.label: Id
columns.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each customer.

columns.name: company_name
columns.label: Name
columns.comment: The cusomers company name

columns.name: contact_name
columns.label: Contact
columns.comment: Name of a contact person

columns.name: contact_title
columns.label: Title
columns.comment: The title or role the contact person has in the customer company (e.g. Owner, Sales Representative, Marketing Manager).

columns.name: address
columns.label: Address
columns.comment: The first address line of the customer.

columns.name: city
columns.label: City
columns.comment: The city of the customer address.

columns.name: region
columns.label: Region
columns.comment: The region of the customer address.

columns.name: postal_code
columns.label: Postal code
columns.comment: The postal code of the customer address.

columns.name: country
columns.label: Country
columns.comment: The country of the customer address.

columns.name: phone
columns.label: Phone
columns.comment: The telephone number to call the contact person.

columns.name: fax
columns.label: Fax
columns.comment: The fax number to call the contact person.

tables.name: customer_customer_demo
tables.label: Customer-Demo
tables.comment: Stores the relationships between customer and costomer demographics.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.label: Customer Id
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the customer.

columns.name: customer_type_id
columns.label: Type-Id
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the customer demographic.

tables.name: customer_demographics
tables.label: Customer Demographics
tables.comment: A customer democraphics describes customer segments, e.g. Retail, Wholesale, Corporate, etc.

columns.name: customer_type_id
columns.label: Id
columns.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each customer demographic.

columns.name: customer_desc
columns.label: Description
columns.comment: A description to the customer demographic.

tables.name: employees
tables.label: Employee
tables.comment: Stores employee information, such as their names and titles.

columns.name: employee_id
columns.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each employee.

columns.name: last_name
columns.label: Last Name
columns.comment: Last name of employee.

columns.name: first_name
columns.label: First Name
columns.comment: First name of employee.

columns.name: title
columns.label: Title
columns.comment: The title or role the employee has in the company

columns.name: title_of_courtesy
columns.label: Courtesy
columns.comment: The employees courtesy

columns.name: birth_date
columns.label: Date of Birth
columns.comment: The employees date of birth.

columns.name: hire_date
columns.label: Hire Date
columns.comment: The date the employee was hired.

columns.name: address
columns.label: Address
columns.comment: The address line of the employee.

columns.name: city
columns.label: City
columns.comment: The city of the employee address

columns.name: region
columns.label: Region
columns.comment: The region of the employee address.

columns.name: postal_code
columns.label: Postal Code
columns.comment: The postal code of the employee address.

columns.name: country
columns.label: Country
columns.comment: The country of the employee address

columns.name: home_phone
columns.label: Phone
columns.comment: The telephone number of the employee.

columns.name: photo
columns.label: Phota
columns.comment: The portrait photo of the employee

columns.name: notes
columns.label: Notes
columns.comment: Notes to the employee

columns.name: reports_to
columns.label: Reports To
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the supervisor (employee) the employee is reporting to.

columns.name: photo_path
columns.label: Path
columns.comment: Path or URL to the photo

tables.name: employee_territories
tables.label: Employee-Territory
tables.comment: Stores the relationships between employees and territories.

columns.name: employee_id
columns.label: Employee Id
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the employee.

columns.name: territory_id
columns.label: Territory Id

tables.name: orders
tables.label: Order
tables.comment: Holds records of customer orders, including OrderID, OrderDate, and CustomerID.

columns.name: order_id
columns.label: Id
columns.comment: A surrogate primary key used to uniquely identify each order.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.label: Customer Id
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the customer.

columns.name: employee_id
columns.label: Employee Id
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the employee.

columns.name: required_date
columns.label: Required Date
columns.comment: The date the customer requires the order

columns.name: shipped_date
columns.label: Shipped Date
columns.comment: The date the order is shipped.

columns.name: ship_via
columns.label: Via
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the shipper.

columns.name: freight
columns.label: Freight
columns.comment: The shipping freight.

columns.name: ship_name
columns.label: Ship Name
columns.comment: The name of the company to ship the order to.

columns.name: ship_address
columns.label: Ship Address
columns.comment: The address of the company the ship goes to.

columns.name: ship_city
columns.label: Ship City
columns.comment: The city of the company the ship goes to.

columns.name: ship_region
columns.label: Ship Region
columns.comment: The region of the company the ship goes to.

columns.name: ship_postal_code
columns.label: Ship Postal Code
columns.description: The postal code of the company the ship goes to.

columns.name: ship_country
columns.label: Ship Country
columns.description: The country of the company the ship goes to.

tables.name: order_details
tables.label: Order Details
tables.comment: Links orders to products, detailing which products are included in each order.

columns.name: order_id
columns.label: Order Id
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the order.

columns.name: product_id
columns.label: Product Id
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the product.

columns.name: unit_price
columns.label: Unit Price
columns.comment: The unit price valid to the order.

columns.name: quantity
columns.label: Quantity
columns.comment: The quantity of the order.

columns.name: discount
columns.label: Discount
columns.comment: The discount to the order.

tables.name: products
tables.label: Product

columns.name: category_id
columns.label: Category Id
columns.comment: A foreign key identifying the category.

columns.name: quantity_per_unit
columns.label: Quantity per Unit

columns.name: unit_price

columns.comment: The unit price the product is sold before discount.

columns.name: units_in_stock
columns.label: in Stock
columns.comment: The units in stock.

columns.name: units_on_order
columns.label: in Order
columns.comment: The units on order.

columns.name: reorder_level

columns.comment: Minimum units on stock before ordering new products.

columns.name: discontinued

columns.comment: Signs whether the product is discontinued
